theme_rankings.why_now: 거버넌스보단 실제 트래픽·결제 사용처. TON·BNB 일일 활성 유저 검증.
theme_rankings.risk: 투기 대비 변동성 낮지만 폭발력도 작음. 환희장에서 underperform.

theme_rankings.why_now: 토큰 가격은 하락했지만 매출 폭증 중. AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출 직접.
theme_rankings.risk: 토큰 인플레이션 압력 + 사용자 보상 의존. 베어 마켓에서 매도 압력 큼.

theme_rankings.why_now: 실제 매출 + 토큰 보유자 환원. P/S 가시화로 밸류에이션 재평가 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 스마트컨트랙트 위험 + 규제. 매출은 시장 변동성에 큰 폭으로 변동.

theme_rankings.why_now: 기관 자금 유입 가장 빠른 영역. BlackRock·Franklin 등 진입.
theme_rankings.risk: 규제 의존적. 거시 금리 환경 변화 시 단기 자금 이탈 가능.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🌐 검증된 L1 — 이더 외 실수요 입증된 체인들
theme_rankings.why_now: 솔라나 압도적 점유 + 신흥 L1(Sui·Aptos)도 자금 유입. 생태계 prop value 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: L1 간 경쟁 격화. 사용자·개발자 이탈 시 멀티플 빠르게 축소.

theme_rankings.tagline: 📈 ETF 승인 후보 + 이더 L2 — 기관 매집 영역
theme_rankings.why_now: SOL·LTC ETF 가능성 + L2 거래량 회복. 다음 cycle 메이저 후보.
theme_rankings.risk: ETF 미승인 시 단기 조정. L2는 fee market 경쟁 심화.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🥇 시장 방향성 기준 — 비트는 디지털 금, 이더는 인프라
theme_rankings.why_now: BTC ETF 자금 유입, ETH 스테이킹 + L2 매출. 알트 사이클의 출발점.
theme_rankings.risk: 거시 유동성·금리에 직접 노출. ETF 자금 흐름이 단기 방향성을 좌우.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🤖 크립토 버전 AI 베팅 — 분산 컴퓨팅·에이전트
theme_rankings.why_now: AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출. 미국 AI 주식 테마와 동행 흐름.
theme_rankings.risk: 내러티브 의존도 큼. 실수요 검증 아직 미흡. 알트 변동성 폭.

narrative.summary: Akash: 정량 종합 55점, 라벨 HOLD. 단기 61 / 중기 64 / 장기 42. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 과열
overheat.guidance: 조정(10~15% 하락) 기다리는 게 안전. 지금은 관망.

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 1개 시그널 합류 — 일봉 200MA. 현재가 대비 +36.0% 위치.
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $0.4716 아래 손절가 $0.4072 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

multi_tf.note: TF가 align 안 됨 — conviction 낮음, 보수적 사이징.

top_news.title: Enbridge CEO on Canada Pipelines, Natural Gas Outlook
top_news.summary: Enbridge President & CEO Greg Ebel discusses the agreement between Canada and the Alberta province about the carbon tax deal. He discusses the ramifications for future pipelines in the country and how it can affect North America at large going forward. He speaks with Katie Greifeld & Isabelle Lee on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Stocks Post Worst Day Since March as Bonds Get Hit: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: A selloff in global bonds halted a rally in stocks, with concern intensifying that central banks will be forced to tighten policy to keep inflation in check amid persistently elevated oil prices.

top_news.title: Argentina’s YPF Seeks Incentive Program for $25 Billion Oil Project
top_news.summary: State-run Argentine energy giant YPF SA announced a $25 billion project to accelerate oil production, marking the largest investment since President Javier Milei took office.

top_news.title: Equities & Bonds Take a Hit To Close the Week | Closing Bell
top_news.summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Hedge Funds Boost Bullish Copper Wagers to Five-Month High
top_news.summary: Money managers increased their bullish bets on copper to the highest since December before prices traded on New York’s Comex climbed to a fresh record high.

top_news.title: Ford Falls Most in 15 Months After AI-Driven Rally Abates
top_news.summary: Ford Motor Co.’s blistering rally screeched to a halt Friday, as a broader market selloff cooled enthusiasm over the automaker’s potential to benefit from the boom in energy demand for artificial intelligence.

top_news.title: GIC, Itausa Lead $1 Billion Injection in Aegea, Diluting Equipav
top_news.summary: Aegea will receive as much as $1 billion in fresh capital from shareholders, led by Singapore sovereign wealth fund GIC Pte and Itaúsa SA, as it prepares a potential bid for Minas Gerais’ state-owned utility Copasa, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_news.title: US Needs Another Decade to Fix $1.2 Trillion Rare Earth Crisis
top_news.summary: Rare earths are the backbone of modern tech, and China has cornered the global market for them. As it uses that dominance as geopolitical leverage, can other countries break its grip? Joe Deaux, Bloomberg News Corporate and Economic Statecraft Reporter joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss why global powers are racing to secure rare earths.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Wall Street Prices Out Rate Cuts, Eyes Hikes, Global Bond Selloff Deepens | Real Yield 5/15/2026
top_news.summary: "Bloomberg Real Yield" highlights the market-moving news you need to know. Today's guests: Columbia Threadneedle Portfolio Manager, Total Return Bond Ed Al-Hussainy, JPMorgan Management CIO of US GFICC Kay Herr, CreditSights Global Head of Credit Strategy Winnie Cisar, and Ironsides Macroeconomics Director of Research Barry Knapp. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Consumers Feel Affordability Crunch Heading Into Summer
top_news.summary: Blake Leonard, Stew Leonard’s Wines & Spirits President joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss  summer trends, the outlook for the consumer and what is selling and expected to sell. Blake also shares on if Stew Leonard has ever thought about going public.  (Source: Bloomberg)
